title: Restore CKC linked images, folders, albums, and media notes
operator_request: CKC links images and folders to a character sheet, creates albums per character, and supports image-specific notes and tags.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Resume from CKC character sheet model and existing Atelier media refs. Do not invent a separate media database if Loom/assets already own the file authority.

scope.summary: Bring CKC media linking back to production parity: character-linked images/folders/albums, media notes, and reusable typed media refs.
base_scope: Map existing Loom/assets/Atelier media refs to CKC character sheet versions.
Implement character albums and folder/image link management.
Separate image notes/tags from character sheet notes.
Make linked media rows inspectable, selectable, and draggable/reusable in other Handshake surfaces.
Update internal UserManual with CKC media and album workflow.
acceptance_criteria: A CKC character can show linked images/folders/albums.
Image notes/tags are distinct from character sheet notes.
Linked media persists through the existing backend authority path.
Argus can inspect and steer album/media rows.
verification: Backend tests for media link persistence.
Native UI tests for album/media rows and stable author_ids.
Argus evidence for media selection and notes surface.
